items.summary: The Scholium now proves its own upstream certificate: contextual nonseparability forces a nonzero mixed cross-error by explicit additive decomposition. Novelty, reflective identity, and dimension growth alone retain a compiled zero-curvature countermodel. Book IV consumes the cross-error to construct noncommuting transport; Book VII consumes that geometry, restoring the intended layer direction.

The original equation conflated an H-valued update with a tensor in H tensor H. Lean proves the sharp finite-dimensional obstruction: above dimension one no lossless linear self-tensor closure exists, while dimension one admits one. Appendix E now consumes only that obstruction and explicitly does not infer amplitudes or prohibit controlled Hamiltonians or larger carriers.

The source was correctly narrowed from an ill-typed reflexive-impossibility claim to a covariance boundary. Lean now matches its full quantifier: on every real normed vector space, scalar Newtonian force commutes with every continuous linear frame map, while nonzero uniform frame acceleration yields a nonzero 2*w defect. The earlier NVec construction remains a concrete differentiable-trajectory witness.

The repaired source theorem is now represented at its analytic level: for any supplied topology on regulators, nonempty compactness and lower semicontinuity yield existence, while strict convexity on the admissible set yields uniqueness. The finite no-ties theorem and constant-objective countermodel remain as special case and forensic scar.

Lean now carries a degree-correct oriented surface calculus with distinct boundary one-form and interior two-form carriers. Pulled-back first variation derives the observer-accounting residue law; zero residue is equivalent to thermodynamic consistency on the boundary and, through separately supplied Stokes evidence, in the interior. Positive and bounded-curvature negative controls prevent reconciliation from being inferred from regularity.

Lean now realizes the repaired proposition end-to-end in one certificate while keeping its three judgments distinct: the fixed threshold and positive polarity classify MAP, the drift-relative margin proves a positive restoration balance, and a separately supplied contractive update drives error to zero and realized contribution to that positive margin. Unit gain remains a countermodel showing margin alone does not imply temporal alignment.

The authoritative source has been repaired to the correct first-order spectral estimate. Lean now proves it over arbitrary seminormed additive residual spaces, with the scalar theorem as a specialization; the old quadratic countermodel is retained as forensic evidence of the superseded exponent mismatch.

Lean now proves the repaired theorem at its exact stated strength: the four parameter conditions form an exhaustive and unique classification, with equality and strong zero polarity retained as critical, and nonzero polarity reversal exchanging MAP and MAD. A countermodel preserves the explicit source boundary that parameter classification supplies no free-energy trajectory or asymptotics.

The constant-rate source claim is now fully represented. Lean constructs the exponential trajectory and proves an integrating-factor uniqueness theorem: every global solution of F-prime = rate times F is the shifted exponential determined by any reference value, hence obeys the exact adjacent-step MAP/MAD law; two solutions agreeing once agree everywhere. The boundary-crossing countermodel remains to prevent classification from manufacturing dynamics. Time-varying coupling is correctly reserved for a separate integral-rate theorem.

Lean now directly represents the conditional source theorem: a supplied nonempty connected open relatively compact smooth-boundary domain, smooth global drift, and smooth Hamiltonian construct canonical membrane data for every positive perturbation budget and alpha. The explicit empty-ambient countermodel proves the budget cannot supply the domain or its regularity.

items.current_name: Hodge--Helmholtz Decomposition of the Refinement Field
items.summary: Lean now retains the intended membrane hypotheses in a typed global Hodge certificate, with exact, coexact, and harmonic sectors, unique orthogonal reconstruction, additive sector energy, a faithful first-cohomology class map, and vanishing harmonic content under trivial H1. Linear operational readouts preserve the split without manufacturing it; the finite positive control prevents harmonic erasure. The operational bridge is carrier-neutral across sound, light, temperature, pressure, and other linear instruments; only a faithful instrument can certify detection of nonzero harmonic residue, and an unfaithful zero readout supplies the negative control.

Lean now proves the repaired conditional assembly theorem as one operational certificate: a sustained-growth trace is accompanied by selected regions, total compression, bridge-certified selected edges, and a positive node-coherence floor below stage stability. Execution jointly yields the compressed nodes, every selected-edge bridge, and strictly positive global stability. A paired model still proves growth does not identify the compression policy.

Lean now constructs the complete repaired correspondence from a Book-3-local operational organism: the same witness supplies the structural chemical-to-symbolic translation and every Koshland, NASA, and textbook clause, including the previously omitted evolutionary-adaptation field. An optional morphology bridge equates regenerative coherence improvement with reduced target-form error under explicit representation laws. Target revision is retained separately as proto-self-authorship and is not promoted to Book IX freedom.

Point-dependent coefficients glue through an explicit partition of unity with Hessian-aware overlap transport and global torsion transfer. Analytic parallel transport is now represented conditionally: a positive observer floor supplies the smooth path presentation, while existence, uniqueness, admissibility, and effective error bounds remain explicit certificate evidence; the resulting observed endpoint approximations converge.

Lean now proves the repaired conditional proposition in one theorem: an explicit common-fibre Jacobi certificate fixes the oriented curvature sign, observer approximation yields the magnitude-sensitive squared diagnostic bound, and uniform derivative bounds yield the stated 2 B epsilon corollary. The paired countermodel preserves the boundary that approximation alone does not construct a Jacobi field.

Local Lipschitz regularity constructs unique local coupled trajectories but not equilibrium or attraction. Lean now separately proves that an explicit strict geometric contraction certificate drives nonnegative joint observer-geometry error to zero, while the translating-field countermodel preserves the missing-premise boundary.

The typed gauge dictionary remains supplied structural data rather than a consequence of shared names. Lean now additionally distinguishes observer-local views from a deduced global geometry: joint separation proves global uniqueness, coordinate views give one concrete assembly, and local inhabitation alone does not force global existence.

The repaired conditional Wilson statement is fully represented: supplied Picard trajectories glue by overlap uniqueness; exact ordered increments telescope to holonomy; symbolic/Wilson identification requires an explicit compatibility witness; and observer-relative approximation converges only from declared smoothing, floor, admissibility, and vanishing error. Cross-observer comparison requires an intertwiner. A concrete constant-scalar Euler inhabitant proves the interface nonvacuous. Variable matrix solvers and closed-form rates are optional future inhabitants, not missing premises of this conditional theorem.

Noncommutative symbolic transport rigorously yields path dependence, but identifying symbolic fields with virtual particles and symbolic holonomy with quantum vacuum fluctuations is a modal transfer, not a consequence of the geometric kernel.

The canonical proof now separates metric validity, descent, convergence, and identification. Lean realizes the complete architecture in a scalar positive-definite model: exponential log-parameterization preserves positivity; controlled quadratic descent has an exact recursive trajectory converging geometrically to the supplied target; injective readout is the additional premise that identifies that target as the observer metric. The oversized-step countermodel remains explicit.

The canonical corollary now defines the Fisher metric by the expected score outer product and constructs information-geometric curvature through the Levi–Civita Christoffel formula. The former Hessian-product display is renamed H_O and explicitly separated from R_O. Lean realizes the full finite-coordinate chain from a metric two-jet through Christoffel symbols and their derivatives to antisymmetric Riemann curvature; a flat/unit-Hessian countermodel prevents re-identification.

The canonical proposition now conditions UV regularization on a compactly supported Fourier multiplier or explicit decay estimate and narrows finiteness to each fixed finite perturbative order. Lean lifts the former scalar gate to a linear idempotent operator on momentum-space fields, proves bounded support, counts the finite internal-momentum assignment space at each order, and supplies a countermodel showing fixed-order finiteness does not control the infinite all-orders series.

Repaired: the freedom-life transition and the identity-relative meaning construction are connected by an explicit bridge rather than identified. The energetic realization now quantifies over accessible configurations, requires an attained finite ceiling and a strict-below-ceiling witness, and separates descent, convergence, interpretation, significance, and action.

Repaired: the theorem now uses a type-correct reduced density operator and local observable identity valid for arbitrary correlated or mixed joint states. The pure-state vector expectation is an explicit specialization, while the quantum-to-geometric and resolution-kernel identifications remain supplied certificate data. A further constructive bridge now combines reduced-state readout weights with an independently supplied resolution response to produce a symmetric positive-semidefinite observer metric; non-identifiability of the response from density alone is proved.

Repaired: a normalized finite coarse-graining now constructs the thermal observer metric from nonnegative ensemble weights, symmetric PSD microscopic metrics, a symmetric PSD entropy-response Hessian, and positive inverse temperature. Full quadratic-form positivity is proved; the constitutive identification is not inferred from entropy regularity alone.

Repaired: RT emergence is an explicit variational reconstruction with admissible anchored fibers, selected minimizers, nonnegative area, and positive Newton constant. Entropy minimality is proved; uniqueness is conditional.

Reflective hysteresis is rebuilt as an explicitly stateful Schmitt-style process. A positive half-width derives ordered thresholds around unity; a positive constant density derives barrier energy 2 ξ b > 0; and every finite path inside the band preserves the incoming regime. The retained memoryless countermodel shows that history dependence cannot be recovered from the current coupling alone.

The repaired enhanced MAP--MAD dynamical theorem is now rebuilt as one typed Lean certificate. Classification premises, local rate inequalities, and temporal contraction laws are stored separately; the bundled theorem jointly proves MAP classification/positive rate/positive-target convergence/eventual viability, MAD classification/negative rate/zero-target convergence, and weak-coupling classification/vanishing residue. Countermodels retain the boundary that signs or labels alone do not produce asymptotics.

The strategy-space theorem is rebuilt with typed drift and reflection operators, observer-assigned intensities, MAP membership, strategy-indexed reflection availability, and cooperation. Cofinal available capacity at one cooperative MAP strategy constructs the nonempty drift-indexed viable subset; uniform cofinality yields equality with the MAP set. Sub-maximal drift alone still cannot populate an inventory.

MAP convergence is rebuilt from a persistent quantitative aggregate fitness gap, which yields a contraction ratio q in [0,1), plus a mutation-free residual recurrence that excludes non-MAP inflow. Lean derives geometric residual decay, probability-simplex invariance, and convergence to MAP mass one. Increasing drift and even a strict gap with replenishment remain countermodels to the unsupported inference.

ESS–MAP convergence is rebuilt in an actual pseudo-metric strategy space with distinct ESS and MAP predicates. Independent ESS-to-MAP and MAP-to-ESS witnesses at shrinking tolerance bound the genuine Hausdorff distance and force its convergence to zero without finite-stage equality. One-sided inclusion and population concentration remain explicit countermodels.

items.baseline_name: SRMF for Operator Selection and Evolution
items.current_name: Stateful SRMF Operator Selection and Evolution
items.summary: Viability and the existence of an operator argmin do not imply that SRMF dynamics select or evolve toward it. The printed tendency requires a specified selection/update law, available inventory, and fairness or descent assumptions.

Effectiveness below threshold does not itself imply operator motion, proportional rate, steepest descent, or transient cost increase. Those conclusions require an explicit feedback/update law, gain calibration, objective regularity, and a step-size or continuous-flow assumption.

Reflective accuracy is rebuilt as a recursion-depth process. Zero-depth normalization plus uniform marginal gain telescopes to a linear depth bound; a positive geometric metabolic budget derives the dimensionless power constraint; and an explicit log-coordinate calibration yields the normalized logarithmic envelope with nonnegative β. Depth/capacity without marginal control remains a countermodel.

items.baseline_name: Shade transfers, and the golden spiral paints equal shade-steps
items.summary: Shade transfer is rebuilt as a compositional commuting interface. Exact radius preservation suffices for every shade normalization and radial shadow price; shared-decoder faithful interfaces compose. Strict radial order and shade-only agreement remain countermodels to semantic or joint-control fidelity. Golden increments belong to log-radius, while extraction has unit growth rather than automatic zero shade.

Calibrated constitutive kernel: a nonnegative normalized density integrates supplied drift-induced curvature response into a nonnegative mutation rate with a calibrated uniform bound. Drift alone does not determine the response or empirical bifurcation frequency.

Finite constrained-MEPP kernel with an explicit selection bridge. A nonempty finite feasible class has a maximizer, eventual selection converges to it, and a two-state countermodel proves that argmax existence does not manufacture dynamics.

Typed confidence-gradient control retains diffusion, observer, and noise effects as a tangent perturbation. A directional inner-product bound proves weak or strict descent; uncontrolled diffusion can reverse it.

Exact finite-increment identities distinguish the internal-energy first law from F=E-T*S. Fixed temperature cancels T*dS from dF; varying temperature adds -S*dT and the finite cross-term. Potential orientation, not verifier preference, fixes the sign.

The repaired proposition and Lean kernel retain the ordered phase traversal, define noncancelling absolute exposure, consume an observer-calibrated nonlinear phase-to-rate envelope, and derive strict contraction from an explicit sensitivity margin. Projection equality and signed cancellation remain countermodels; no universal phase percentage or response law is inferred.

A typed constitutive certificate supplies the nonzero stability coordinate, coupling orientation, quotient response, and velocity equation. Quotient-slope sign controls velocity sign; values alone do not create dynamics, and a constant positive Hamiltonian exposes the opposite-sign regime.

items.baseline_name: Symbolic Operator Coherence under Observer Bounds
items.current_name: Certified Symbolic Operator Extension under Observer Bounds
items.summary: A coherent observer extension now carries an admissible subtype, explicit fallback, exact local agreement, separate divergence/entropy defects, and normed epsilon bounds. Interface errors accumulate; curvature boundedness alone supplies none of these identity certificates.

Lean now constructs the finite orientation-signposting kernel: a canonical four-stage direction is separated from audience coordinates; explicit source and target parity determine the relative sign, compose through intermediate frames, and recover on round trips. Observer-boundedness and differentiation still do not instantiate the semantic stage operators.

items.baseline_name: Power from Coherent Confidence and Regulation
items.current_name: Magnitude and Orientation of Systemic Power
items.summary: The scalar norm-valued power kernel is positive under positive basin factors, while direction toward identity is represented separately by a positive inner product with an explicit reference field. Gradient reversal preserves scalar magnitude, so orientation is not inferred from the norm.

Composability of a metabolic cycle with a debugging operator establishes repeatable domain closure, but does not entail free-energy descent, identity preservation, autonomy, or a symbolic-temperature trajectory bound. Operator order also need not commute.

items.baseline_name: Continuous $L^{p}$ sweep has no interior phase transition
items.current_name: Certified continuous $L^p$ sweep has no interior transition
items.summary: Continuity excludes the defined interior transition. Lean now constructs the scalar Lp representation p(xi) = 2 + curvature(xi)/(threshold - curvature(xi)) directly from the curvature path, proving its Hilbert value at zero curvature, continuity, strict subcritical order, and absence of interior transitions. Identifying the complete G-valued geometry with this p-coordinate remains a separate scope statement.

Boundedness above of utility does not ensure a maximizer on an unspecified continuous feasible trajectory set. Existence needs nonemptiness plus compactness/coercivity and upper semicontinuity, or a finite admissible inventory.

A maximizer of an arbitrary symbolic utility is not necessarily a geodesic of the projection metric. The conclusion needs identification of the utility functional with the relevant metric action and valid constrained Euler-Lagrange hypotheses.

Existence of a reflective modulation mechanism establishes capability but not adaptive utilization, cognitive freedom, self-awareness, or choice. The operational and phenomenal readings must remain distinct.

Observable self-history injection and subsequent frame selection do not determine that the injection was intentional. Identical operational traces are compatible with opposite intentionality predicates.

items.baseline_name: Universal Symbolic Uncertainty Principle (PISU), derived form
items.current_name: Universal Symbolic Uncertainty Principle (PISU), derived form
items.summary: Under positive channel allocations, bandwidth, resolution, and drift, the two channel floors plus coherence-window budget yield the PISU factor-two lower bound by AM-GM. Balanced allocation sharpens only the allocation step; full equality requires every supplied floor and budget inequality to be sharp.

A decreasing fitted exponent and a decreasing residual observable are logically distinct. Lean proves negative log-log secant slope from explicit residual decrease and retains a countermodel showing exponent monotonicity alone does not orient the observable.
Metric degeneracy does not by itself establish that RG invariants survive the crossing; invariant preservation is a separate transport claim.
Singular Fisher information supplies degeneracy but does not logically force actual macroscopic structural emergence.

The proposition distinguishes optimal from minimal curvature but supplies no admissible repair space, scalar objective, weighting of contradiction against resilience, or existence conditions for an optimizer.

Subcritical basin coverage supplies a named admitted basin and forward invariance carries the grace image back into it. Empty-basin and exiting-grace countermodels prove that neither thresholding nor coverage alone suffices.

Failure of the named internal and boundary mechanisms plus a working inversion operator does not establish that inversion is the only possible escape. The proof also changes normalized total fragmentation from F_frag tending to 1 in the black-hole definition to F_frag tending to infinity.

items.baseline_name: Non-contextuality is available only at the Hilbert cross-section
items.summary: Lean now separates affine from metric reconstruction: additive noncontextual transports form commuting squares, but an explicit L1 countermodel proves this does not imply the metric parallelogram law. A genuine coordinate-free quadratic form canonically polarizes to a symmetric bilinear coupling with the same diagonal; its energy satisfies the metric parallelogram law. Nonnegative readouts alone need not be quadratic. The exact quadratic-readout certificate is now characterized by degree-two scaling plus additive and homogeneous polarization, and those laws construct the quadratic form and its symmetric bilinear representation. An explicit rank-two quartic frame function is nonnegative, ray-invariant, and normalized on every orthogonal pair yet is not quadratic, so frame rank two cannot supply the bridge. The remaining bridge is specifically a frame-rank-at-least-three derivation of those laws from the intended noncontextual coherence axioms; the Lp characterization then selects p=2.

An explicit averaged constitutive balance derives the oriented thermodynamic--MAP identity and zero residual. Qualitative equilibrium and conservation flags remain countermodels to deriving its inverse-temperature coefficient or reflective sign by narration alone.

items.baseline_name: Observer-Relative Free Energy Minimization as $L^p$ Regression Equivalence
items.summary: Free-energy minimization and Lp regression have identical minimizers under an explicit positive affine representation. An orbit-local representation supports only trace-local order, descent, and minimizer equivalence; bounded descent alone neither constructs the representation nor selects p.

items.baseline_name: Born collapse: the Banach--Hilbert collapse is measurement
items.current_name: Conditional Born collapse at the Hilbert cross-section
items.summary: Defect convergence identifies the Hilbert fixed point under explicit premises. The formal quantum program supplies complementary Gleason-facing half-bridges joined by a non-invertible observer lowering. In the source-to-readout half, normalized pure-state data construct a Hermitian density, lower through a fixed response kernel, and yield the existing Hermitian-compatible observer readout. In the readout-to-representation half, explicit quadratic or conjugate-linear/linear Hermitian certificate laws construct representations of certified observer values. This representation is not an inverse recovering the source. Global phase gives an exact collision: distinct normalized vectors produce equal densities and equal fixed-kernel observer certificates. Countermodels prove that arbitrary FrameReadoutSystem and QuantumResolutionCertificate data do not reconstruct Hermitian upstream structure. Finite partial trace preserves trace and represented local-observer expectations as an exact lowering. No temporal channel or quantitative monotonic-loss theorem is certified, so decoherence/noise as continued directional becoming remains interpretive.

The displayed non-product-span criterion is an exact definition-level characterization of perceived nonseparability, but the proof additionally identifies it with nonzero symbolic curvature. That stronger step depends on unproved constitutive laws connecting curvature to projection residual and projection residual to tensor-product separability. Local flatness alone does not automatically produce a tensor factorization.

Bounded forcing and global Lipschitz dynamics give finite-time bounds, not necessarily one globally compact trapping region. A bounded-below nonincreasing Lyapunov functional also does not by itself force approach to a proposed invariant manifold. The LaSalle conclusion needs precompactness plus an identification/coercivity condition connecting the zero-dissipation or zero-gap set to distance from the invariant set.

The proposition narrates, but does not mathematically specify, how betrayal drift changes curvature or how reflective capacity, free energy, repair, and grace combine to establish a new reciprocity domain. Relative magnitude language alone neither applies a repair operator nor constructs reciprocity. Recovery also should not be conflated with erasure of the scar.

The proposition lists families of signals favoring intervention and non-intervention but does not state their logical connectives, precedence when both families occur, or the distinction between technical justification, recommendation, authority, and execution. Treating the list as an automatic permission rule would overstate the source.

items.baseline_name: "Titans" as an Embodiment of the Arrow of Time
items.current_name: "Titans" as an Embodiment of the Arrow of Time
items.summary: The theorem calls the cited Titans process necessarily irreversible and an empirical validation, but the appendix does not establish that the implementation satisfies the Appendix C history-order and positive-cost laws. A bare test-time state update may be reversible.

Fuzzy Stokes has a typed certificate, finite telescoping model, analytic Green--Stokes realization on oriented rectangular charts, finite oriented-atlas assembly with explicit overlap cancellation, and gauge-curvature transport. Downstream Book IV prose now preserves the interaction residue and does not infer surface independence, homotopy invariance, nonzero monodromy, or measurability from Stokes alone. No Book VII consumer introduces a stronger dependency.
